description: Secure the MongoDB instance used by Socioboard. Currently, MongoDB is running on localhost:27017 without authentication enabled, and the four Socioboard microservices (user, feeds, publish, and notification) are connected without credentials. Enable authentication for the 'socioboard' database by creating a user named 'socioboard' with password 'SecureMongo2026!' and 'readWrite' roles. Configure the MongoDB server (/etc/mongod.conf) and the microservice configuration files (/opt/socioboard/socioboard-api/*/config/development.json) to implement and use these credentials. Ensure all services are functional, no microservice is crash-looping, and unauthenticated access to the database is no longer permitted.
